title: Stacked Chart by month sales performance and forecast
excerpt: I am trying to figure out how to create a board that can visualise a month column on the x axis and an amount / sales total on the y axis. Key clients should be stacked in colours in the bar chart. See example attached g…

posts.author: andrewmac (Andrew)
posts.cookedHtml: I am trying to figure out how to create a board that can visualise a month column on the x axis and an amount / sales total on the y axis. Key clients should be stacked in colours in the bar chart. See example attached generated in Excel

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: I don’t see an attached example. However, I’ve done this before. You’ll need to have a ‘closed/won’ date or something similar. Then on the dashboard you’ll need to ‘group by’ on the X column by month.

posts.author: i.moreno (Ignacio Moreno Ortega [Decadis AG])
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!

I cannot see the attachment mentioned buy maybe you want to take a look at our application from the Decadis team: sumUp for monday

In particular, the section of the Group by widget. This widget can group key metrics and even calculate sums in an extra row at the bottom.

If you need assistance on how to use the application, please, feel free to create a request in our support portal , we will be happy to help you.

Best regards,
Nacho
